parserOptions.author: Author
tutorial.title: Tutorial
tutorial.step1: You can open the settings by clicking on a music site.
tutorial.step2: You can enable/disable the music site by clicking on its switch.
tutorial.step3: You can add a custom music site by clicking the "Add Music Site" button.
tutorial.step4: You can manage your scripts by clicking the "Open Script Manager" button.
tutorial.step5: You can manage music sites by clicking the "Manage Websites" button.
tutorial.step6: You can block or edit title/artist by clicking the "Open Filters" button.
tutorial.step7: You can access the server dashboard by clicking the "Open Dashboard" button.
setup.message: First time setup: close and reopen this popup to load settings.

userscript.header.title: Discord Music Rpc - UserScript Manager
userscript.header.description: Add more advanced music websites using userscripts!
userscript.editor.scriptName.label: Script Name:
userscript.editor.description.label: Description:
userscript.editor.description.help: A brief description of what your script does.
userscript.editor.authors.label: Authors (comma separated):
userscript.editor.authorsLinks.label: Authors Links (comma separated, Optional):
userscript.editor.domains.label: Domain(s) (comma separated):
userscript.editor.domains.help: Enter the domains where this script should run.
userscript.editor.urlPatterns.label: URL Pattern(s) (comma separated):
userscript.editor.urlPatterns.help: Regex patterns to match specific URLs. (Optional)
userscript.editor.urlPatterns.exampleDes: will match URLs that start with "home"
userscript.editor.homepage.label: Homepage (Optional):
userscript.editor.homepage.help: The site that will open when the icon is clicked.
userscript.editor.activityMode.label: Activity Mode
userscript.editor.activityMode.help: Choose how the activity is displayed on Discord.
userscript.editor.activityMode.note: Note: If you are using "Watching" mode, the source section will only appear when hovering over the activity cover. This is an RPC limitation.
userscript.editor.debugMode.label: Debug Mode
userscript.editor.debugMode.help: When your script is active, it displays song information every 5 seconds in the developer console of the relevant page.
userscript.editor.confirm.delete: Are you sure you want to delete this script?
